auth_notes: Requires Client ID and Client Secret for OAuth 2.0 (Client Credentials flow) or a specific API Key/Token depending on whether the target is the Reveal or Fleet platform.
rate_limits: Varies by contract; typically 1,000 to 5,000 requests per day with specific per-minute throttling.
gotchas: API access often requires manual enablement by a Verizon account manager before credentials will work
Documentation is fragmented between the 'Reveal' and 'Fleet' product lines which use different base URLs and schemas
Real-time data is difficult to achieve as the API is optimized for polling rather than streaming
research_notes: Integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. It is recommended to use n8n's 'OAuth2' credential type to handle token refreshing automatically. Users should verify if they are on the Reveal or Fleet platform as the endpoints differ significantly (e.g., reveal.verizonconnect.com vs api.fleet.verizonconnect.com).

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. It is recommended to use n8n's 'OAuth2' credential type to handle token refreshing automatically. Users should verify if they are on the Reveal or Fleet platform as the endpoints differ significantly (e.g., reveal.verizonconnect.com vs api.fleet.verizonconnect.com).
